'''Adion Lang''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] native from [[Lankashiir]], who served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] he was on board of the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] to observe and eventually arrest [[Detien Kaileel]], who was supplying weapons to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. While there he met an old friend and lover, [[Celia Durasha]], whom he hadn't seen in [[7 BBY/Legends|seven years]]. When she tried to escape the ''Princess'' with Kaileel, Adion stopped them, killing Kaileel but was unable to stop Celia from escaping and was cut several times with a [[Vibroknife/Legends|vibroknife]] given to her by her dead [[Raine Durasha|twin]].
